Bus Timings

64 Bus Schedule Gold Souq Bus Station to Ras Al Khor, Terminus

June 2, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Dubai Bus 64 offers a crucial link between the bustling Gold Souq Bus Station and the Ras Al Khor Terminus.

Route Name 64
Route Description Gold Souq Bus Station · 7 - Ras Al Khor, Terminus
Total Distance Approximately 32.6 to 49 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 98 minutes
Operational Hours 05:00 to 00:00 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 64

Bus 64 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus 64 operates with a consistent schedule throughout the day. The timings for the bus are as follows:

From Gold Souq Bus Station From Ras Al Khor, Terminus

06:00 06:00

Bus 64 Timetable

To view the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to access the 64 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus 64 is AED 3, offering an economical option for passengers traveling across its entire route. This pricing ensures that passengers can enjoy a cost-effective journey while exploring various parts of Dubai.

Bus Booking

Currently, Bus 64 does not offer online booking options. Passengers can board the bus at any of the designated stops along the route. For real-time updates, schedules, and fare information, it is advisable to use the RTA Dubai app or visit the official website. These resources provide the latest details on bus timings and operational changes, ensuring a smooth travel experience.

Bus Route

  1. Gold Souq Bus Station · 7

  2. Naif, Intersection

  3. Burj Nahar, Intersection

  4. Islamic Institute

  5. Rasheed Road

  6. Hor Al Anz, Roundabout

  7. Hor Al Anz, Turnoff

Bus 64 Station Overview

Gold Souq Bus Station · 7

Gold Souq Bus Station · 7 is a key transit hub located in the heart of Dubai’s bustling Gold Souq area.

It is well-equipped with essential amenities, including sheltered waiting areas and real-time schedule updates, ensuring a comfortable travel experience. The station’s central location provides easy access to local shops, commercial areas, and other attractions in the vicinity, making it an important part of the local transportation network.

Hor Al Anz, Turnoff 1 Bus Stop Intersection

The Hor Al Anz, Turnoff 1 Bus Stop is a major transit hub where Bus Routes 5, 23, 64, 13B, 13D, and C18 intersect. This central location provides passengers with efficient connections between these diverse routes, facilitating seamless travel across various parts of Dubai. The stop’s strategic placement ensures easy access to multiple destinations, making it a crucial point for commuters navigating the Hor Al Anz area.

Intersecting Bus Routes at Abu Hail Clinic 1

This strategic location offers seamless connections between these routes, providing comprehensive travel options for passengers across various parts of Dubai. The intersection’s connectivity facilitates easy transfers and enhances accessibility for commuters traveling within the city, making it a central hub for efficient public transportation.

Abu Hail Center 2 Bus Stop Intersection

The Abu Hail Center 2 Bus Stop serves as a crucial intersection for Bus Routes 64, 13B, C09, and C10. This stop connects passengers to various destinations across Dubai, making it a vital hub for commuters in the Abu Hail area. Its proximity to the Abu Hail Center ensures convenient access to shopping, dining, and other services, catering to the needs of both locals and visitors.

Al Qusais Metro Bus Stop Intersection

The Al Qusais Metro Bus Stop is a crucial transit hub where Bus Routes 13, 31, and 64 intersect. This central location facilitates seamless travel across various parts of the city, offering passengers easy connections to multiple destinations. Its strategic position and diverse route options enhance convenience for daily commuters and travelers navigating the Al Qusais area.

Ras Al Khor, Terminus

Ras Al Khor, Terminus serves as a major bus station located in the Ras Al Khor area, a key industrial and residential district in Dubai.

The station plays a crucial role in managing transportation needs in this busy district.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus 64 in Dubai passes by several notable tourist attractions and destinations:

  1. City Centre Deira: Located near the Burj Nahar, Intersection stop, this major shopping mall offers a wide range of retail stores, dining options, and entertainment facilities.

2.

3.

4.

  1. Hamriya Shopping Center: This stop is known for its local shops and eateries, offering a taste of Dubai’s vibrant shopping culture.

  2. Stadium Metro: Near the Shabab Al Ahli Club stop, this area hosts various sporting events and is close to Dubai’s sports facilities.

These stops provide convenient access to various cultural, shopping, and leisure activities, making Bus 64 a useful route for exploring different facets of Dubai.

Journey Experience

This sanctuary, home to thousands of migratory birds, including flamingos, is a hidden gem for nature lovers. Despite the lengthy journey, the 64 route offers a unique mix of Dubai’s old-world charm and industrial development, making it an engaging experience for both locals and visitors.

Travelling with Careem

With the Careem app, you can travel to Ras Al Khor, Terminus, the final stop on the Bus 64 route, starting from Gold Souq Bus Station · 7, with a price range of AED 63-76. This convenient fare range ensures a comfortable and reliable journey to one of the key destinations on the route. Utilizing the app provides an easy way to estimate and manage your travel costs, making your trip to Ras Al Khor seamless and efficient.

This guide to Bus 64 aims to offer a comprehensive overview of the route, stops, and operational details, helping you navigate your journey across Dubai efficiently. Whether you’re a daily commuter or an occasional traveler, this information ensures that you can plan your trips with ease and confidence. For additional convenience, make sure to stay updated with real-time schedules and service notifications through the RTA Dubai app or website.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: June 2, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
